# .github/pull_request_template.md

## Summary
What does this change do, in one or two sentences?

## Related
- Fixes #<issue-number>
- Relates to #<issue-number>

## What changed
- 
- 

## Why / context
Brief rationale, constraints, and key tradeoffs.

## Acceptance criteria
Copy the checklist from the issue and check items you’ve satisfied:
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## How to test
Steps someone else can follow:
1)
2)
3)

## Evidence
- Logs:
- Screenshots / recordings:
- Metrics:

## Risk & rollout
- Risk level: Low / Medium / High
- Rollout plan:
- Rollback plan:
- Migration notes (if applicable):

## Reviewer notes
Call out anything reviewers should focus on (files, tricky logic, edge cases).
